_description: Known audio fingerprint patterns per browser engine. Values are OfflineAudioContext summary hashes and statistics from known-good browsers.

v8.notes: V8 browsers produce consistent non-zero audio output

spidermonkey.notes: SpiderMonkey audio output differs from V8 in variance and hash

jsc.notes: JSC may have different precision in audio processing

all_zeros.description: All audio samples are zero — audio API is blocked or fake

all_unique.description: Every sample is unique — noise injection detected

sample_mismatch.description: getChannelData() and copyFromChannel() return different values

very_low_variance.description: Variance < 1e-20 — samples may be clamped or fake

very_high_variance.description: Variance > 0.1 — unusual audio output suggests manipulation

zero_hash.description: Hash is 0 — all samples likely identical
